tasks.package:windows: deno eval "await Deno.mkdir('release', { recursive: true });" && deno desktop --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --output ./release/PackageRunner.exe --icon ./desktop/assets/app-icon.png --allow-read --allow-write --allow-run --allow-env --allow-net=127.0.0.1,localhost --include ./release/payload-manifest.json --include ./desktop/assets ./desktop/main.ts
tasks.package:mac:arm: deno eval "await Deno.mkdir('release', { recursive: true });" && deno desktop --target aarch64-apple-darwin --output /tmp/PackageRunner-macos-arm64.app --icon ./desktop/assets/app-icon.png --allow-read --allow-write --allow-run --allow-env --allow-net=127.0.0.1,localhost --include ./release/payload-manifest.json --include ./desktop/assets ./desktop/main.ts
